---
title: "Colony level analyses"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-16"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(readxl)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
library(broom)
#rm(list = ls())

#calculating ED50 for all datasets and combining with metadata
#read in metadata
file_path <-here("Data")
  cbass_metadata<-read_xlsx("Data/ESA_CBASS_metadata.xlsx")

EDsdf<-read.csv("Data/EDsdf-all.csv")
#read in all site files
files <- list.files(here("Data"), pattern = "PAM\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)

cluster_df<-read.csv("Data/cluster_by_ks.csv")

#combine cbass data
combined_df <- files %>%
  map_dfr(~ read_csv(.x) %>% mutate(source_file = basename(.x)))

#join metadata with raw pam value data to get grouping property into metadata
combined_df <- combined_df %>%
  left_join(cbass_metadata, by = c("Bag_number", "Species", "Site","Date"))

combined_df <- combined_df %>%
  mutate(GroupingProperty = paste(Site, Species, Genotype, sep = "_"))


#remove duplicates 
metadata_small <- combined_df %>%
  mutate(Grouping_property = paste(Site, Species, Genotype, sep = "_")) %>%
  distinct(Grouping_property, .keep_all = TRUE)

EDsdf_clean <- EDsdf %>%
  select(-Species, -Site)  # drop duplicates if present

#combine 
cbass_dataset <- metadata_small %>%
  left_join(EDsdf_clean, by = "GroupingProperty") %>%
  left_join(cluster_df, by = "GroupingProperty")

cbass_dataset

cbass_dataset$DW <- cbass_dataset$ED95 - cbass_dataset$ED5
#clean
cbass_dataset <-  cbass_dataset %>% 
  select(
    GroupingProperty, 
    Species,
    Site,
    Tank_color, 
    Date, 
    Size_cm, 
    Partial_mortality,
    Colony_depth_ft, 
    ED50, 
    ED5, 
    ED95, 
    DW,
    Cluster_4,
    Cluster_5,
    Cluster_6,
    Cluster_7,
    Cluster_8)

write.csv(cbass_dataset, file = "Data/full_cbass_dataset.csv")

#long format
ED_long <- cbass_dataset %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ED5, ED50, ED95, DW),
    names_to = "ED_level",
    values_to = "ED_value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Species = factor(Species, levels = c("AABR", "AHYA", "AGLO", "ICRA")))

#subset each value
ED50 <- ED_long %>% filter(ED_level == "ED50")
ED5<- ED_long %>% filter(ED_level == "ED5")
ED95<- ED_long %>% filter(ED_level == "ED95")
DW<- ED_long %>% filter(ED_level == "DW")
```

```{r}
#visualize patterns

#just change DW, ED95, etc here and plot
plot_df <- DW %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Colony_depth_ft, Partial_mortality, Size_cm),
               names_to = "Predictor",
               values_to = "Value")

ggplot(plot_df,
       aes(x = Value, y = ED_value, color = Species)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~Predictor, scales = "free_x") +
  ylab("DW")+
  theme_classic()

#subset icra to look at PM
```


```{r}
#remember, Site effects are confounded with experimental runs and are therefore interpreted as block effects!!
#starting with grouped ED_values

#Q: Do colony traits affect ED, and do those effects differ among species? By using the split(ED_long, ED_long$ED_level), can test effect of each ED level.
models_main <- lapply(split(ED_long, ED_long$ED_level), function(df) {
  lmer(
    ED_value ~ Species + Colony_depth_ft + Partial_mortality + Size_cm + (1 | Site),
    data = df
  )
})


#add interactions (does xxx affect ED differently in each species)

models_int <- lapply(split(ED_long, ED_long$ED_level), function(df) {
  lmer(
    ED_value ~ Species * (Colony_depth_ft + Partial_mortality + Size_cm) + (1 | Site),
    data = df
  )
})


#compare models
anova_table <- lapply(names(models_main), function(ed) {
  m1 <- models_main[[ed]]
  m2 <- models_int[[ed]]
  
  an <- anova(m1, m2)
  
  an_df <- as.data.frame(an) %>%
    rownames_to_column("model") %>%
    mutate(ED_level = ed)
  
  an_df
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

anova_table

#model 1 show lower aic vals for each ED_level. no strong support for interactions




#extract
anova_main <- lapply(names(models_main), function(ed) {
  m <- models_main[[ed]]
  
  an <- anova(m)
  
  an_df <- as.data.frame(an) %>%
    rownames_to_column("term") %>%
    mutate(ED_level = ed)
  
  an_df
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

anova_main


#emmeans
emmeans_table <- lapply(names(models_main), function(ed) {
  m <- models_main[[ed]]
  
  em <- emmeans(m, pairwise ~ Species)
  
  tidy(em$contrasts) %>%
    mutate(ED_level = ed)
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

emmeans_table
```


```{r}
#individual trait effects

#depth
depth_table <- lapply(names(models_main), function(ed) {
  m <- models_main[[ed]]
  
  em <- emtrends(m, ~ Species, var = "Colony_depth_ft")
  
  tidy(em) %>%
    mutate(ED_level = ed, predictor = "Depth")
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

#PM
pm_table <- lapply(names(models_main), function(ed) {
  m <- models_main[[ed]]
  
  em <- emtrends(m, ~ Species, var = "Partial_mortality")
  
  tidy(em) %>%
    mutate(ED_level = ed, predictor = "PM")
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

#size
size_table <- lapply(names(models_main), function(ed) {
  m <- models_main[[ed]]
  
  em <- emtrends(m, ~ Species, var = "Size_cm")
  
  tidy(em) %>%
    mutate(ED_level = ed, predictor = "Size")
}) %>%
  bind_rows()

trait_effects <- bind_rows(depth_table, pm_table, size_table)

trait_effects


```

```{r}
#combined traits
lmm_traits_combined <- lmer(
  ED_value ~ Species * ED_level +
    Colony_depth_ft + Partial_mortality + Size_cm +
    (1 | Site),
  data = ED_long
)

anova(lmm_traits_combined)
#ED_level is sig
```
